name: Bakahazard 1+2
short_description: Embark on a journey of several can-be-seen-everywhere ordinary students from the "Breakfast High School" saving the world, in this simple traditional turn-based RPG that makes no sense at all.
detailed_description:
An unknown virus infected the city "Gongtong city" and turned everyone into low-definition monsters.

Embark on a journey of several can-be-seen-everywhere ordinary students from the "Breakfast High School" saving the world, in this simple traditional turn-based RPG that makes no sense at all.

It's an amusingly funny, meantime absurdly bizarre story.

Fight in high-school campus, infected city streets, employee dormitories for mega-corporations, hallucinations, and hyperspace.

Enjoy a simple enough traditional turn-based RPG, overcome enemies with unique characters and skills,

and find the unique joy that belongs to old-fashioned games.

FEATURES

Old-school turn-based RPG

Explore a wide variation of areas, from the high school campus, to the otherworldly hyperspace

A boy but looks like girl

Fight a toilet

Fight a floodgate

Contains two separate game as "Bakahazard" and "Bakahazard 2", select via Steam launch options.

If you encounter serious problems that stops game from working, please send feedback to 1262917464@qq.com
